CustomField.description: Agent accountable for this commission statement — owns reconciliation, matching of Commission Lines to Insurance records, and resolution of unmatched lines. Populated at statement intake. Does not drive commission payout attribution; per-line attribution is handled by Commission_Line__c.Agent_For_Insurance__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The agent responsible for reviewing and reconciling this statement. This is separate from the agent on each Commission Line (who earned the commission). Use this to assign ownership when the statement arrives from the provider.
CustomField.label: Responsible Agent

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Only agents can be assigned here. The selected record must belong to a Company with record type "Agent".
